title: NarrativeLockDoc
description: Frozen messaging architecture for the cycle. Output of phase2.narrative_lock — the Phase 2 exit gate artifact.

expires_at.description: When this lock auto-expires (default: end of cycle)

summary.description: 1-paragraph executive summary of the locked narrative

referenced_artifacts.description: Specific artifact_refs and versions this lock binds together

narrative_arc.description: The story this cycle tells, in 5 acts

context.description: What's happening in the market right now

tension.description: The pain audience feels that's getting worse

resolution.description: How we resolve it for the audience

proof.description: Why the audience can believe us

must_say.description: Phrases / framings every downstream artifact must include in some form

must_not_say.description: Positioning traps to avoid (in addition to tenant brand_voice.banned_phrases)

lock_conditions_to_reopen.description: Events that would justify breaking the lock mid-cycle (e.g. 'competitor acquisition by hyperscaler', 'regulatory ruling on X')
